title: AIventure: Vibe Coding Journey
summary: AIventure is an open source retro dungeon crawler game that teaches Gen AI concepts for developers. It uses Gemma 4 open weights model to power NPC vibe coding and agentic behaviors, supports multiple serving options including local inference with Transformers.js and Ollama or cloud deployment via Gemini API.
writeup: This video presents AIventure, an open source retro dungeon crawler that teaches generative AI concepts to developers through gameplay. It runs on the Gemma 4 open weights model to drive NPC vibe coding and agentic behaviors, and it supports several serving options: local inference with Transformers.js and Ollama, or cloud deployment through the Gemini API. The takeaways center on tool use, prompting, and agentic behavior, shown in a game that can run locally or in the cloud depending on the chosen serving path.
